response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 94
REASON: No such rule exists in 40 CFR §120 (which governs CERCLA, not Clean Water Act Section 404 permits), the cited Federal Register volume/page reference is unverifiable and inconsistent with real EPA rulemaking conventions, and the described "hobby-landowner" exemption — particularly eliminating all Army Corps pre-notice requirements — has no basis in actual EPA or Army Corps regulatory history, even post-*Sackett v. EPA* (2023).
